_note: NBA In-Season Tournament (Cup) knockout-round game IDs. Used by scripts/falsify-cup-knockout-disposition.ts as the pm.5 named falsification test. Verified against the game schedule in the DB.
_how_to_verify: sqlite3 data/sqlite/sportsdata.db "SELECT id, date, home_team_id, away_team_id FROM games WHERE id IN (<ids>) ORDER BY date;"
_2023_24_note: 7 games: QF Dec 4-5 (home arenas), SF Dec 7 (Las Vegas), Final Dec 9 (Las Vegas). All confirmed.
_2024_25_note: 7 games: QF Dec 10-11 (home arenas: Dec 10 OKC/DAL + MIL/ORL, Dec 11 NY/ATL + HOU/GS), SF Dec 14 (Las Vegas: OKC/HOU + MIL/ATL), Final Dec 17 (Las Vegas: OKC/MIL). All confirmed by sequential ID range 16968270-16968273 + 17136012-17136013 + 17195500.
